candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Prepaid costs and accrued income Total current assets
candidates.why: Contains current-assets wording but appears to be a malformed/detail line rather than the clean total.
Balancing item, not a reported current-assets total.
Balancing item, not the clean reported total.
Exact balance-sheet cash line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the start of the period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet cash stock target.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash line, preferred over cash-flow beginning/ending cash rows.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Non-current, so not LCT.
Balancing item, not current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities total, not LCT.
Current financing liability under the current-liabilities section; appropriate component of short-term debt.
Appears in the current-liabilities section and can represent current portion of borrowings.
Short-term interest-bearing borrowing; typically included in short-term debt.
Lease-related liability and should be excluded from baseline STD.
Cash flow movement, not a balance-sheet debt stock.
Cash flow movement, not a balance-sheet debt stock.

variables.notes: These appear to be the current interest-bearing debt components on the balance sheet. Excluded 'Debts user rights' because it is lease-related. Manual review flagged because the statement does not provide one clean 'current borrowings' total and component structure could vary by year.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Deferred taxes are non-current/non-operating timing differences, not taxes payable.
Tax asset, opposite of taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chose outside shortlist; confident because it is the explicit current tax liability line.

candidates.why: Exact match for net total property, plant and equipment.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Gross
candidates.why: Tangible fixed asset subtype, but not the preferred total PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset detail, not total PPE.
Cash flow investing line, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected the clean total net PPE line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Best match for net cash flow from operating activities after working-capital changes.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes inworking capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Chose outside the shortlist because this is the clearer net operating cash flow line, whereas the shortlisted line is only before working-capital changes.
